title: New Revolution
description: An incredible modpack for Fabric, packed with new features.
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Revolution/BH_New_Revolution_Header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/new-revolution-modpack) version.** ## This modpack has been recently developed for all those players who love Minecraft, but with some modification to make the game much better. Among other things, players will have the possibility to find new structures, enemies, tools or even a lot of new features. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Revolution/BH_New_Revolution_Summary.webp) New Revolution Modpack incorporates dozens and dozens of mods with the aim of improving the experience, as well as expanding the game possibilities. For example, some of them will be in charge of increasing the number of biomes or structures in the games. All the mods are from Fabric, therefore, it will be essential to use this executable. This makes the optimization of the game even better, allowing it to be played on the vast majority of devices, regardless of the high number of mods installed. Aside from adding new biomes to the default world, Minecraft's dimensions will also undergo certain changes related to its generation. And in fact, the creator has added several dimension mods, which will multiply the hours of fun when playing with this fantastic pack of mods. The decorations are fundamental in any game, as well as the construction materials (blocks, stairs and other ideal elements to build). Therefore, this modpack also adds several dozen mods solely aimed at improving this aspect of the game. All mods fit seamlessly with the "vanilla" or default Minecraft experience, therefore it does not add any mods that drastically change the gameplay experience. Really, it will be as if the developers have released several more versions focusing on expanding the possibilities. 👋 Immerse yourself in a much more realistic and fun adventure, but always keeping in mind the vanilla essence of Minecraft. Enjoy now mods like AmbientSounds, Better Animations Collection, Not Enough Animations, Falling Leaves, Eating Animation and much more! 🏡 Discover new structures and impressive dungeons with Additional Structures, Explorify, YUNG's or Medieval Buildings, among other fantastic mods. 🦁 Elephants, lions, giraffes... a lot of new animals are waiting for you, thanks to the amazing Naturalist, Fish of Thieves fish or many other mods like More Mob Variants. 💍 You will also now be able to start a family, get married and have children to help you with your daily tasks... MCA Reborn is the one in charge of all of this... 😎 Let's not forget about optimization and shaders, more than a dozen optimizer mods have been added, including Sodium and Iris Shaders. 🙆🏻 It's a fantastic opportunity for you to play with your friends, for that, mods like Simple Voice Chat, Emotecraft or Emojiful have been added! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Revolution/BH_New_Revolution_FAQ.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Images](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Revolution/BH_New_Revolution_Images.webp) ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3zh8e2et/images/4bf9ae58c96d32fc5f32ec8286cb5178268fe68f.jpeg) ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3zh8e2et/images/dfc27f9d62d73c42f17cf00feee8d5d77309d4c3.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
